summary: Full backend + frontend regression run for Lumina AI Interview. 12/12 backend pytest tests pass after fixing an ObjectId serialization bug in POST /api/auth/register. Frontend end-to-end signup → dashboard → new interview (Gemini 3 Flash) → chat → finish → report flow works. Landing (3D AI Core, marquee, method, capabilities, counsel, modes, roadmap, FAQ, footer) renders without runtime pageerrors. Auth page shows email/password form and Google button.

minor.issue: Anonymous landing page fires /api/auth/me which returns 401 (expected). Two 401 console entries appear on every page load — consider suppressing when no token present.

issues: Toast 'Welcome to the atelier.' appears over the Depart button in the top-right nav corner (minor z-order/positioning nit).

action_items: None blocking. Optionally suppress /api/auth/me call when no auth token exists on public routes to remove noisy 401 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: register endpoint previously returned motor-mutated doc containing ObjectId `_id` causing 500. Fixed by excluding `_id` from response. Recommend a small utility (e.g., `strip_mongo`) used across all insert-then-return paths so this class of bug can't reappear.
server.py is a single 674-line module — split into routers (auth, interviews, resumes, stats) as it grows.
llm_chat uses substring match `"budget" in msg` — brittle; consider matching Emergent's specific error code/type if available.
test_credentials: demo@lumina.ai / Demo@1234 (seeded). Signup uses random test.<timestamp>@lumina.dev / Test@1234.
seed_data_creation: Test users created via /api/auth/register with TEST-style random emails. One in-progress + completed interview created against demo user for signup path. No cleanup performed (test scope).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend + frontend happy path fully green with gemini-3-flash-preview. Emergent LLM key budget still exhausted for Claude/GPT — API returns 402 with clear message (verified). Google OAuth redirect not clicked end-to-end (per instructions) but button and testid present on /auth. All required data-testid attributes present and used successfully by playwright.
rca of the issue: POST /api/auth/register returned 500 because motor's insert_one() mutates the passed dict to include `_id` (bson.ObjectId), and the handler then returned that dict via FastAPI JSON serialization, which fails ObjectId->JSON conversion. Fix: added `_id` to the exclusion set when constructing the response payload. Verified by re-running pytest test_register_and_me → PASS.
